titleStmt.title: SII 10.327: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 327. (A.R. No. 249 of 1905.) ON A PILLAR AT THE ENTRANCE INTO THE DARK ROOM IN THE TEMPLE OF TRIPURńÄNTAKńíŇöVARA, TRIPURńÄNTAKAM, MARKAPUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT. Ňö. 1171. (Saumya)

summary.p: States that JńĀyasńĀni, wife of ChŇćŠłćebŇćya, son of E√Ījali ChŇćŠłćebŇćya, gave 50 goats for a perpetual lamp in the temple of TripurńĀntaka-MahńĀdńďva.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded in TEI/EpiDoc according to the DHARMA Encoding Guide for Documentary Editions, version 2

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
